---
title: "Species"
description: "Every alive accession with photos, with provenance, acquisition data, and — where written — a deep-dive link"
cascade:
  wide: true
  no_auto_children: true
---

One page per photographed alive taxon in the collection, auto-generated
from the inventory. Each page shows provenance (origin), the vendor /
acquisition record, and all photos on file. When a deep-dive blog post
exists for a species (under *Species of the week* in the blog), the
page links to it; otherwise it stands as a quick reference.

*This section is auto-generated by `scripts/generate_species_pages.py`
— rerun it after adding plants, photos, or updating provenance.*
